chemistry.reaction_name: Continuous flow photochemical cyclization of 2-chlorobenzamides to phenanthridinones
chemistry.bond_formed: C-C bond formation in intramolecular cyclization
chemistry.scope_summary: 16 examples of 2-chlorobenzamides with various substitution patterns (R1-R6) on both aromatic rings, yielding phenanthridinones in 13-99% isolated yields. Electron-donating and electron-withdrawing groups were tolerated. Some ortho-substituted and sterically hindered substrates gave lower yields.

figures.caption: Fig. 1 6 Ĳ 5 H )-Phenanthridinone PARP inhibitors. | Scheme 1 Methods for 6 Ĳ 5 H )-phenanthridinone synthesis.

figures.key_information: Comparison of synthetic methods for phenanthrene derivatives including Schmidt reaction (Method 1), Ullmann coupling 42-50% yield (Method 2), Suzuki coupling 40-60% yield (Method 3), and flow photocyclization up to 99% yield (This work)
figures.caption: Fig. 1 6 Ĳ 5 H )-Phenanthridinone PARP inhibitors. | Scheme 1 Methods for 6 Ĳ 5 H )-phenanthridinone synthesis.

figures.key_information: Photochemical cyclization reaction in acetone at 0.2 mL/min flow rate for 50 minutes residence time
figures.caption: Scheme 2 Flow- hv  reaction of 2-chloro-2 ′ -bromoanilides.

figures.key_information: Photochemical cyclization reaction in flow using acetone as solvent, flow rate 0.2 mL/min, reaction time 50 min, yield 63%
figures.caption: Scheme 2 Flow- hv  reaction of 2-chloro-2 ′ -bromoanilides.

figures.key_information: Photochemical flow synthesis with coil reactor and acetone solvent

translation_logic.batch_limitation: Traditional batch methods show limited yields (42-60% for Ullmann and Suzuki couplings)
translation_logic.flow_advantage: Flow photochemistry enables higher yields up to 99% and continuous processing
translation_logic.what_changed: Reaction mode from batch to continuous flow with photochemical activation
translation_logic.safety_improvement: Continuous processing reduces inventory of photochemically active intermediates

figure_descriptions: Methods comparison scheme showing flow photocyclization advantage
Multiple reactor schemes showing coil photoreactor setup

conflicts: Pump shows 2 inlets in pass3 but some reactor schemes show 1 inlet
notes: Good coverage of flow conditions and reactor setup. Limited batch baseline data. Some inconsistencies in number of inlets between text and figures.
